properties.name: Camino de la Reconquista
properties.source: Touristic narrative line connecting the 5 visited stops in sequence order
properties.note: This LineString supports the Camino de la Reconquista tourist experience as a narrative route between stops. It is not presented as an exact historical trace of the 1806 military campaign.

properties.name: Continuidad historica hacia Chacarita
properties.source: Approximate contemporary reference line from the visited route toward Chacarita/CABA
properties.note: This dashed line shows historical continuity outside the tourist route; it is not an exact trace.
